narrative:
Cols 78-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,335 registered voters, with 66.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
